title: SWOT Analysis Presentation
excerpt: I saw there is a new template for SWOT Analysis - does anyone know how to get this into ‘typical’ quadrant design for a presentation (outside of monday.com - like power point)?

posts.author: KFFG (Kelly Cosgrove)
posts.cookedHtml: I saw there is a new template for SWOT Analysis - does anyone know how to get this into ‘typical’ quadrant design for a presentation (outside of monday.com - like power point)?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @KFFG ,

Welcome to the community!

There is not really a way to export the board in a “typical” quadrant desing, but perhaps it would serve you to export each section separately and then include them in a power point? All filters you apply will also be exported.

Alternatively , you can use a dashboard with 4 table widgets arranged in the appropriate order, one for each category.

I hope this helps!
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
